blurb_en:
China's government has begun requiring AI researchers at private companies—including Alibaba and DeepSeek—to obtain official approval before traveling overseas, extending restrictions that previously applied mainly to state employees.

- The policy started quietly with some DeepSeek executives in December 2025, before expanding to the broader private AI sector in recent months.
- Authorities select individuals based on “strategic value” rather than seniority, making the process opaque and the pool of affected researchers unpredictable.
- The two co-founders of Manus, the Chinese AI startup that relocated to Singapore, were separately barred from overseas travel—a signal that the policy covers founders, not just rank-and-file researchers.
- The irony is not subtle: while China has loudly criticized US export controls on AI hardware, it has now applied the same logic to its own people.
- For the global AI industry, which runs on researcher mobility and cross-border collaboration, this is not a footnote.
blurb_zh:
中国政府已开始要求私营科技公司的AI研究人员——包括阿里巴巴和DeepSeek——出境前须向当局报批，此前类似限制仅适用于官方机构人员。

- 该政策于2025年12月惄然从 DeepSeek部分高管开始实施，随后逐步扩展至整个私营AI行业。
- 审批依据是人员的“战略价值”，而非职级或职务，这使得哪些人被列为限制对象难以预测。
- 已迁至新加坡的中国 AI公司Manus的两位联合创始人也被单独限制出境，表明该政策覆盖范围包括创始人。
- 讷刺之处并不难察觉：中国一直高调批评美国对AI芯片的出口管制，如今却将同样的逻辑惄然用到了本国人才身上。
- 对于依赖研究人员跨境流动的全球AI行业来说，这不是一个可以忽视的脚注。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Bloomberg (May 26), Japan Times (May 27), Tom's Hardware, and Invezz. Multiple sources corroborate: policy started with DeepSeek in Dec 2025, expanded to private sector; Manus founders also affected.

blurb_en:
Black Forest Labs shipped FLUX.2 on May 19, the new generation of the FLUX image model family, featuring multi-reference conditioning, 4-megapixel output, and improved text rendering—built in collaboration with NVIDIA for optimized RTX GPU performance.

- Four models cover different needs: Pro and Flex are hosted commercial APIs, Dev is an open-weight downloadable model requiring a commercial license, and Klein is Apache 2.0 open source.
- Multi-reference conditioning is the headline feature: feed in multiple reference images and the model generates consistent variations that match your visual style across an entire batch.
- NVIDIA-optimized versions run with 40% less VRAM and 40% better performance on RTX GPUs, and install directly in ComfyUI with no additional setup required.
- Black Forest Labs says FLUX.2 eliminates “the AI look”—real-world lighting, physics simulation, and up to 4MP output designed to pass for a photograph.
- For anyone running a production pipeline that relies on consistent AI image generation, this is the upgrade worth testing this week.
blurb_zh:
Black Forest Labs于5月19日发布了FLUX.2，全新一代FLUX图像模型系列，新增多参考图调控、4MP分辨率输出和改进的文字渲染，并与英伟达合作针对RTX GPU进行了专项优化。

- 四款模型覆盖不同场景：Pro和Flex为商业托管API，Dev为可下载的开放权重模型（需商业授权），Klein采用Apache 2.0开源协议。
- 多参考图调控是核心亮点：提供多张参考图，模型就能批量生成在视觉风格上高度一致的变体图像。
- 英伟达优化版本在RTX GPU上可节省40%显存、性能提升40%，直接在ComfyUI中安装，无需额外配置。
- BFL声称FLUX.2能消除“AI感”——具备真实感光照、物理模拟，分辨率最高4MP，让人与照片难以分辨。
- 对于在生产流程中依赖一致性AI图像生成的创作者来说，这是本周值得测试的升级选项。
verification_notes: Confirmed via VentureBeat, NVIDIA blog (RTX optimization), Cloudflare blog (Workers AI partnership confirming May 19 date), Hugging Face model card. Cross-referenced across 4 sources.

blurb_en:
Google upgraded Stitch at I/O 2026 on May 20, turning its AI design tool into a real-time streaming agent with simultaneous multiplayer editing—available globally at no cost.

- The new Stitch Agent renders UI components live on canvas as you type or speak, replacing the previous turn-by-turn workflow with a continuous loop where the canvas keeps up with your thinking.
- Multiple designers can now edit the same Stitch project simultaneously, with an Agent Manager logging the full design history so teams can explore parallel directions.
- Figma charges $15 per editor per month for a comparable collaborative tier; Stitch is free, which is the kind of pricing that tends to end markets quietly.
- Finished designs export to Google AI Studio or publish directly to the web via Netlify, collapsing the gap between designed and deployed.
- Two generation tiers are both free: Standard mode on Gemini 2.5 Flash for quick iteration, Experimental mode on Gemini 2.5 Pro for higher fidelity.
blurb_zh:
谷歌在I/O 2026大会上（5月20日）升级了设计工具Stitch，将其改造为实时流式AI设计代理，并新增多人协同编辑功能，全球用户均可免费使用。

- 新版Stitch Agent在用户输入文字或语音时，直接在画布上实时渲染UI组件，告别了原来“输入一次等一次”的交互模式。
- 多位设计师现在可以同步在同一个Stitch项目中工作，内置Agent Manager记录设计的完整演变轨迹，便于团队探索多个方向。
- Figma同等协作功能每位编辑每月收贵15美元；Stitch免费——这种定价策略通常会惄惄重塑市场格局。
- 完成设计后可直接导出至Google AI Studio或通过Netlify一键发布到网上，大幅缩短从设计到上线的距离。
- 两种生成模式均免费：标准模式使用Gemini 2.5 Flash快速迭代，实验模式使用Gemini 2.5 Pro输出更高保真度。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Google Labs blog, TechTimes (May 20 launch), and multiple AI design tool comparison articles. Real-time agent, multiplayer, free pricing confirmed across multiple sources.
